title: Kohtalo johtaa meitä
actors: Eija Karipää, Eino Katajavuori, Uuno Laakso
plot: Sirkka feels she's doing the right thing killing her cruel stepfather. But there is a witness to the murder, the musician Eino. However, he helps Sirkka get rid of the dead body. Suspected by the police for the murder Sirkka flees...
